Ecological analyses

Author

Victor ANGOT

Note

To be able to run this code, please download “Supplementary Data” from the zenodo link: “https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19066852” and run previously the analysis presented in “Data_preparation.html”

1 Loading packages

Code 
library(vegan)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ape)
library(agricolae)
library(edgeR)
library(tidyr)

2 Loading data

Code 
mydf=read.csv(file="data/mydf_hard_cleaned_0_005.csv",sep=";")
design=read.csv(file="data/design_propre.csv",sep=";")
taxo=read.csv(file="data/original_taxonomy.csv",sep=";",row.names=1)
tree_pea = read.tree("data/phylo_pois.tre")
tree_pea = chronos(tree_pea)

Setting initial dates...
Fitting in progress... get a first set of estimates
         (Penalised) log-lik = -0.8798803 
Optimising rates... dates... -0.8798803 

log-Lik = -0.8783661 
PHIIC = 137.76
Code 
phylo_order <- rev(tree_pea$tip.label)
design$nom_genotype <- factor(design$nom_genotype, levels = phylo_order)

all(rownames(design)==colnames(mydf))
[1] TRUE

3 Alpha diversity

3.1 Calculate indexes

Code 
design$richness=colSums((mydf !=0))
design$shannon<- diversity (t(mydf), index="shannon")
design$sequencing_depth=colSums(mydf)

3.2 Plot Richness

Code 
design$comp <- as.character(design$comp)
comp_levels <- c("Bulk_T0", "Bulk", "R", "Rp", "E", "N")
design$comp <- factor(design$comp, levels = comp_levels)

plot=ggplot(design, aes(x = comp, y = richness, fill = col_comp)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "Microhabitats", y = "Richness", title = "Richness ~ microhabitat") +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) 
kw=kruskal(design$richness,trt=design$comp)
kw
$statistics

  686.5792  5       0

$parameters

  Kruskal-Wallis      none design$comp   6  0.05

svg("plot/richness_microhabitat.svg", width = 8, height = 6)
saveRDS(plot, file = "plot/richness_microhabitat.rds")
print(plot)
dev.off()

3.3 Plot Shannon

Code 
design$comp <- as.character(design$comp)
comp_levels <- c("Bulk_T0", "Bulk", "R", "Rp", "E", "N")
design$comp <- factor(design$comp, levels = comp_levels)

plot=ggplot(design, aes(x = comp, y = shannon, fill = col_comp)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x = "Microhabitats", y = "Shannon", title = "Shannon ~ Microhabitats") +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) 
kw=kruskal(design$shannon,trt=design$comp)
kw

svg("plot/shannon_microhabitat.svg", width = 8, height = 6)
saveRDS(plot, file = "plot/shannon_microhabitat.rds")
print(plot)
dev.off()
png 
  2

#Beta-Diversity ## Host modulation capacity

Code 
dist_bact <- vegdist(t((mydf)), method = "bray")
dist_bact_mat <- as.matrix(dist_bact)

bulk_samples <- design$sample[design$comp == "Bulk"]
genotypes <- unique(design$nom_genotype[!is.na(design$nom_genotype)])
compartments <- c("R", "Rp", "E", "N")

specialization_df <- data.frame(
  genotype = character(),
  specialization_R = numeric(),
  specialization_Rp = numeric(),
  specialization_E = numeric(),
  specialization_N = numeric(),
  mean_specialization = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)


for (gen in genotypes) {
  specializations <- c()
  
  for (comp in compartments) {
    comp_samples <- design$sample[design$nom_genotype == gen & design$comp == comp]
    
    if (length(comp_samples) > 0 && length(bulk_samples) > 0) {
      distances <- c()
      for (comp_sample in comp_samples) {
        if (comp_sample %in% rownames(dist_bact_mat)) {
          sample_dists <- dist_bact_mat[comp_sample, bulk_samples]
          distances <- c(distances, sample_dists)
        }
      }
      specialization <- mean(distances, na.rm = TRUE)
    } else {
      specialization <- NA
    }
    
    specializations <- c(specializations, specialization)
  }
  
  mean_spec <- mean(specializations, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  specialization_df <- rbind(specialization_df, data.frame(
    genotype = gen,
    specialization_R = specializations[1],
    specialization_Rp = specializations[2],
    specialization_E = specializations[3],
    specialization_N = specializations[4],
    mean_specialization = mean_spec
  ))
}

rownames(specialization_df) <- specialization_df$genotype

write.csv(specialization_df, "results/specialization_indices_clean.csv", row.names = FALSE)

specialization_df <- specialization_df %>%
  left_join(design %>% 
              select(nom_genotype, sub_species) %>% 
              distinct(), 
            by = c("genotype" = "nom_genotype"))

specialization_long <- specialization_df %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("specialization_"),
    names_to = "compartiment",
    values_to = "specialization"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    compartiment = gsub("specialization_", "", compartiment),
    compartiment = factor(compartiment, levels = c("R", "Rp", "E", "N"))
  )

p_profiles <- ggplot(specialization_long, aes(x = compartiment, y = specialization, group = genotype)) +
  geom_line(alpha = 0.6, color = "gray60") +
  geom_point(aes(color = sub_species), size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Modulation capacity by across microhabitats by genotypes",
    x = "Microhabitat",
    y = "Modulation index (distance to bulk)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

ggsave("plot/specialization_profiles.svg", p_profiles, width = 10, height = 6)
saveRDS(p_profiles, file = paste0("plot/specialization_profiles.RDS"))

p_profiles

3.4 NMDS

Code 
comp <- factor(design$comp, levels=c("Bulk_T0","Bulk","R","Rp","E","N"))

mymat <- vegdist(t(log10(mydf+1)), method = "bray")
set.seed(123)
nmds <- metaMDS(mymat, k = 2, trymax = 100)

Code 
plot_data <- vegan::scores(nmds) %>% as_tibble(rownames = "samples")

nmds_data <- as.data.frame(plot_data)
nmds_data$samples <- rownames(nmds_data)  
nmds_data$compartment <- design$comp  
nmds_data$compartment <- factor(nmds_data$compartment, levels = unique(design$comp))

p=ggplot(nmds_data, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, color = compartment)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(title = "NMDS colored by microhabitats",
       x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
  scale_color_manual(values = unique(design$col_comp)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  stat_ellipse(type = "norm", level = 0.95, linetype = 2, size = 0.8)+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

ggsave(
  filename = "plot/NMDS_compartment.svg",
  plot = p,
  width = 6, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 300
)

saveRDS(p, file = "plot/NMDS_compartment.rds")

p

3.5 db-RDA

3.5.1 Microhabitats

Code 
unique(design$comp)
[1] E       N       R       Rp      Bulk    Bulk_T0
Levels: Bulk_T0 Bulk R Rp E N
Code 
comp=factor(design$comp,levels=c("Bulk_T0","Bulk","R","Rp","E","N"))

mycap <- capscale(t(log10(mydf+1)) ~ comp,distance="bray");
  mycap.aov <- anova(mycap,permutations = how(nperm=9999));
  mycap.Rsq <- RsquareAdj(mycap);
  mycap.aov;

Code 
dist_mat <- vegdist(t(log10(mydf+1)), method = "bray")


pw <- OmicFlow::pairwise_adonis(
  dist_mat, as.vector(design$comp),
  perm = 9999,
  p.adjust.m = "bonferroni"
)

print(pw)
             pairs Df  SumsOfSqs    F.Model         R2 p.value  p.adj

3.5.1.1 Dispersion homogeneity

Code 
mycap <- capscale(t(log10(mydf+1)) ~ comp,distance="bray");

resid_score <- residuals(mycap)
dist_resid <- vegdist(resid_score)
bd <- betadisper(dist_resid, comp)
pt <- permutest(bd, permutations = 999)
pt

Permutation test for homogeneity of multivariate dispersions
Permutation: free
Number of permutations: 999

Response: Distances
           Df  Sum Sq   Mean Sq      F N.Perm Pr(>F)    
Groups      5 0.02625 0.0052492 8.6817    999  0.001 ***
Residuals 821 0.49640 0.0006046                         
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
Code 
plot(bd)
Code

    95% family-wise confidence level

3.5.2 Genotypes

Code 
samples_to_keep <- rownames(design)[
  !as.character(design$comp) %in% c("Bulk", "Bulk_T0") & !is.na(design$comp)
]

mydf_wo_bulk <- mydf[, samples_to_keep]
design_wo_bulk <- subset(design, !comp %in% c("Bulk", "Bulk_T0"))

all(rownames(design_wo_bulk) == colnames(mydf_wo_bulk))
[1] TRUE
Code 
genotype <- as.factor(design_wo_bulk$genotype)
comp     <- as.factor(design_wo_bulk$comp)

mycap <- capscale(t(log10(mydf_wo_bulk+1)) ~ comp* genotype,distance="bray");
mycap.aov <- anova(mycap,permutations = how(nperm=9999));
mycap.Rsq <- RsquareAdj(mycap);
mycap.aov;
Permutation test for capscale under reduced model

3.5.2.1 Dispersion homogeneity

Code 
resid_score <- residuals(mycap)
dist_resid <- vegdist(resid_score)
bd <- betadisper(dist_resid, interaction(comp,genotype))
pt <- permutest(bd, permutations = 999)
pt

Permutation test for homogeneity of multivariate dispersions
Permutation: free
Number of permutations: 999

Response: Distances
           Df  Sum Sq    Mean Sq      F N.Perm Pr(>F)  
Groups     95 0.07978 0.00083980 1.2186    999  0.099 .
Residuals 719 0.49549 0.00068914                       
---

4 Taxonomy

4.1 Clean taxonomy

Code 
taxo$Kingdom <- ifelse(is.na(taxo$Kingdom), "Unknown", taxo$Kingdom)

columns <- c("Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")


replace_na_hierarchically <- function(df, columns) {
  for (i in seq_along(columns)) {
    col <- columns[i]
    prev_col <- if (i == 1) "Kingdom" else columns[i - 1]
    
    df[[col]] <- ifelse(
      is.na(df[[col]]),
      paste("Unclass", df[[prev_col]], sep="_"),
      df[[col]]
    )
  }
  return(df)
}


taxo <- replace_na_hierarchically(taxo, columns)


for (col in columns) {
  taxo[[col]] <- sub("Unclass_Unclass_Unclass_Unclass_Unclass_", "Unclass_", taxo[[col]])
}
for (col in columns) {
  taxo[[col]] <- sub("Unclass_Unclass_Unclass_Unclass_", "Unclass_", taxo[[col]])
}
for (col in columns) {
  taxo[[col]] <- sub("Unclass_Unclass_Unclass_", "Unclass_", taxo[[col]])
}
for (col in columns) {
  taxo[[col]] <- sub("Unclass_Unclass_", "Unclass_", taxo[[col]])
}
taxo$ASV=rownames(taxo)
colnames(taxo)=c("kingdom","phylum", "class", "order", "family", "genus", "species","ASV")
write.table(x=taxo,"data/taxonomy.csv",sep=";")

4.2 Taxonomy order

Code 
taxonomy=taxo
design$sample_id <- rownames(design)
mydf_tax=mydf
mydf_tax$ASV <- rownames(mydf_tax)
taxonomy$ASV <- rownames(taxonomy)

mydf_tax <- mydf_tax %>%
  pivot_longer(-ASV, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "count") %>%
  left_join(taxonomy, by = "ASV") %>%
  left_join(design, by = "sample_id")

mydf_tax$Order=mydf_tax$order

relative_abundance_by_Order <- mydf_tax %>%
  group_by(Order, sample_id) %>%
  summarize(summed_count = sum(count, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(sample_id) %>%
  mutate(relative_abundance = summed_count / sum(summed_count, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

top_11 <- relative_abundance_by_Order %>%
  group_by(Order) %>%
  summarize(mean_relative_abundance = mean(relative_abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_relative_abundance)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 11) %>%
  pull(Order)

relative_abundance_by_Order <- relative_abundance_by_Order %>%
  mutate(Order = ifelse(Order %in% top_11, Order, "others"))

relative_abundance_final <- relative_abundance_by_Order %>%
  group_by(sample_id, Order) %>%
  summarize(relative_abundance = sum(relative_abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  left_join(design, by = "sample_id") %>%
  mutate(comp = factor(comp, levels = c("Bulk_T0","Bulk", "R", "Rp", "E", "N")))


mean_abundance_by_Order_comp <- relative_abundance_final %>%
  group_by(Order, comp) %>%
  summarize(mean_relative_abundance = mean(relative_abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  mutate(
    Order = ifelse(grepl("Allorhizobium-Neorhizobium-Pararhizobium-Rhizobium", Order), "Rhizobium", Order)
  )

mean_abundance_by_Order_comp <- mean_abundance_by_Order_comp %>%
  arrange(mean_relative_abundance) %>% 
  mutate(Order = factor(Order, levels = unique(Order)))

plot_Order_comp_only <- mean_abundance_by_Order_comp %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = comp, y = mean_relative_abundance, fill = Order)) +
  facet_grid(~comp, scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill", width = 1) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Paired") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Relative abundance", labels = scales::percent) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, size = 5),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
        strip.background = element_blank())

ggsave("plot/plot_Order_comp_only.svg", plot = plot_Order_comp_only)

saveRDS(plot_Order_comp_only,file="plot/plot_Order_comp_only.rds")

write.table(mean_abundance_by_Order_comp, file="results/taxo_order_comp_11.csv", sep=";")

plot_Order_comp_only

5 edgeR

5.1 Differential analysis

5.1.1 Global

Code 
compartiments <- unique(design$comp)
compartiments <- compartiments[!compartiments %in% c("Bulk")]

all_results <- list()


for(compartment in compartiments) {

  design_sub <- design[design$comp %in% c("Bulk", compartment), ]
design_sub$comp <- droplevels(design_sub$comp)

mydf_sub <- mydf[, rownames(design_sub)]

dge <- DGEList(counts = mydf_sub, group = design_sub$comp)

keep <- rowSums(cpm(dge) > 1) >= 2
dge <- dge[keep, , keep.lib.sizes = FALSE]

library_sizes <- colSums(dge$counts)
median_size <- median(library_sizes)
dge$samples$norm.factors <- median_size / library_sizes

design_matrix <- model.matrix(~ comp, data = design_sub)

dge <- estimateDisp(dge, design_matrix)
fit <- glmQLFit(dge, design_matrix)
qlf <- glmQLFTest(fit, coef = 2)
  
  results <- topTags(qlf, n = Inf)$table
  results$ASV <- rownames(results)
  
  logFC_threshold <- 1
  fdr_threshold <- 0.05
  up_compartment <- paste0("Upabondant_", compartment)
  
  results <- results %>%
    mutate(
      regulation = case_when(
        logFC > logFC_threshold & FDR < fdr_threshold ~ up_compartment,
        logFC < -logFC_threshold & FDR < fdr_threshold ~ "Upabondant_Bulk",
        TRUE ~ "Not_significant"
      ),
      significance = ifelse(FDR < fdr_threshold, "Significatif", "Not_significant"),
      comparison = paste("Bulk_vs", compartment)
    )
  
  all_results[[compartment]] <- results
  
  summary_table <- results %>%
    dplyr::group_by(regulation) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(n_ASVs = n(),
              pourcentage = round(n()/nrow(results)*100, 2),
              .groups = 'drop')
  print(summary_table)
  
  color_values <- c("red", "blue", "grey")
  names(color_values) <- c(up_compartment, "Upabondant_Bulk", "Not_significant")
  
  volcano_plot <- ggplot(results, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(FDR))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = regulation), alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = color_values) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(fdr_threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-logFC_threshold, logFC_threshold), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    labs(title = paste("Volcano Plot - Bulk vs", compartment),
         x = paste("log2 Fold Change (", compartment, "vs Bulk)"),
         y = "-log10(FDR)") +
    theme_minimal()
  
  print(volcano_plot)
  
  filename <- paste0("results/edgeR_results_Bulk_vs_", compartment, ".csv")
  write.csv(results, filename, row.names = FALSE)
}
# A tibble: 3 × 3
  regulation      n_ASVs pourcentage
  <chr>            <int>       <dbl>
1 Not_significant    138        10.2
2 Upabondant_Bulk    576        42.4
3 Upabondant_E       645        47.5
# A tibble: 3 × 3
  regulation      n_ASVs pourcentage
  <chr>            <int>       <dbl>
1 Not_significant    265        29.8
2 Upabondant_Bulk    530        59.6
3 Upabondant_N        95        10.7
# A tibble: 2 × 3
  regulation      n_ASVs pourcentage
  <chr>            <int>       <dbl>
1 Not_significant   1860       94.3 
2 Upabondant_R       113        5.73
# A tibble: 3 × 3
  regulation      n_ASVs pourcentage
  <chr>            <int>       <dbl>
1 Not_significant   1744       87.3 
2 Upabondant_Bulk      3        0.15
3 Upabondant_Rp      250       12.5 
# A tibble: 1 × 3
  regulation      n_ASVs pourcentage
  <chr>            <int>       <dbl>
1 Not_significant   1132         100
Code 
results_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(all_results)
write.csv(results_all, "results/results_all_edgeR.csv", row.names = FALSE)

5.1.1.1 Plot taxa shifts

Code 
taxonomy=read.csv(file="data/taxonomy.csv", header=TRUE, sep=";", row.names=1)

topN <- 20
orders_of_interest <- list(
  R   = c("Burkholderiales","Micrococcales","Sphingomonadales"),
  Rp  = c("Burkholderiales", "Pseudomonadales","Sphingomonadales"),
  E   = c("Burkholderiales", "Hyphomicrobiales","Sphingomonadales"),
  N = c("Hyphomicrobiales")
)

for(comp in names(all_results)) {
  df_comp <- all_results[[comp]]
  reg_comp <- paste0("Upabondant_", comp)

  asv_up <- df_comp %>%
    filter(regulation == reg_comp) %>%
    pull(ASV)

  cat("Number of ASVs upabundants in", comp, "vs Bulk:", length(asv_up), "\n")
  
  if(length(asv_up) == 0) {
    cat("No significant ASV - skip\n")
    next
  }
  
  taxo_up <- taxonomy %>%
    filter(ASV %in% asv_up) %>%
    left_join(df_comp %>% filter(ASV %in% asv_up) %>%
                select(ASV, logFC, FDR, logCPM), by = "ASV")

  taxo_up <- taxo_up %>%
    mutate(
      label = ifelse(grepl("Unclass", species, ignore.case = TRUE),
                     species,
                     paste(genus, species, sep = "_"))
    )

  df_orders <- taxo_up %>%
    filter(order %in% orders_of_interest[[comp]])

  top_orders <- df_orders %>%
    group_by(order) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = logFC, n = topN) %>%
    ungroup()

  if(nrow(top_orders) == 0) {
    cat("No ASV for the order of interest in", comp, "\n")
    next
  }

  top_orders_plot <- top_orders %>%
    group_by(order, label) %>%
    mutate(n_points = n()) %>%
    ungroup()

  plot_facets <- ggplot(top_orders_plot, aes(x = reorder(label, logFC), y = logFC)) +
    geom_jitter(alpha = 0.7, size = 2, width = 0.2, color = "black") +
    geom_boxplot(
      data = top_orders_plot %>% filter(n_points >= 2),
      alpha = 0.3, outlier.shape = NA, color = "black"
    ) +
    facet_wrap(~order, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = paste("Top ASVs up in", comp, "- facetted by order"),
         x = "Genus_Species", y = "log2 Fold Change (vs Bulk)") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
      strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
    )

  ggsave(filename = paste0("plot/top_ASVs_facetted_", comp, "_signif.png"),
         plot = plot_facets, width = 8, height = 8)

  summary_top <- top_orders %>%
    select(ASV, genus, species, label, order, logFC, FDR, logCPM) %>%
    arrange(desc(logFC)) %>%
    mutate(Rank = row_number())
  write.csv(summary_top, paste0("plot/Resume_top_ASVs_", comp, "_facetted_signif.csv"), row.names = FALSE)


  summary_by_label <- summary_top %>%
    group_by(label) %>%
    summarise(
      n_ASVs = n(),
      max_logFC = max(logFC),
      median_logFC = median(logFC),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(n_ASVs))
  write.csv(summary_by_label, paste0("plot/Resume_ASVs_by_label_", comp, "_facetted_signif.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}
Number of ASVs upabundants in E vs Bulk: 645 
Number of ASVs upabundants in N vs Bulk: 95 
Number of ASVs upabundants in R vs Bulk: 113 
Number of ASVs upabundants in Rp vs Bulk: 250 
Number of ASVs upabundants in Bulk_T0 vs Bulk: 0 
No significant ASV - skip

5.1.2 By genotype

Code 
genotypes <- unique(design$nom_genotype)
genotypes <- genotypes[!is.na(genotypes)]

all_results <- list()

for (geno in genotypes) {
  for (compartment in compartiments) {

    design_sub <- design[
      (design$comp == "Bulk") |
      (design$comp == compartment & design$nom_genotype == geno),
    ]

    design_sub$comp <- droplevels(design_sub$comp)

    if (nlevels(design_sub$comp) != 2) {
      message("SKIP: ", geno, " / ", compartment)
      next
    }

    mydf_sub <- mydf[, rownames(design_sub), drop = FALSE]

    dge <- DGEList(counts = mydf_sub, group = design_sub$comp)

    keep <- rowSums(cpm(dge) > 1) >= 2
    dge <- dge[keep,, keep.lib.sizes = FALSE]

    library_sizes <- colSums(dge$counts)
    dge$samples$norm.factors <- median(library_sizes) / library_sizes

    design_matrix <- model.matrix(~ comp, data = design_sub)

    dge <- estimateDisp(dge, design_matrix)
    fit <- glmQLFit(dge, design_matrix)
    qlf <- glmQLFTest(fit, coef = 2)

    results <- topTags(qlf, n = Inf)$table
    results$ASV <- rownames(results)

    results <- results %>%
      mutate(
        regulation = case_when(
          logFC > 1 & FDR < 0.05 ~ paste0("Upabondant_", compartment),
          logFC < -1 & FDR < 0.05 ~ "Upabondant_Bulk",
          TRUE ~ "Not_significant"
        ),
        genotype = geno,
        comparison = paste("Bulk_vs", compartment)
      )

    key <- paste(geno, compartment, sep = "_")
    all_results[[key]] <- results

    write.csv(results,
      paste0("results/results_edger_genotype/edgeR_", geno, "_Bulk_vs_", compartment, ".csv"),
      row.names = FALSE
    )
  }
}
results_all <- bind_rows(all_results)
results_all$genotype <- factor(results_all$genotype,
                                  levels = phylo_order)

fdr_threshold <- 0.05
logFC_threshold <- 1

asv_count_geno <- results_all %>%
  filter(
    FDR < fdr_threshold,
    abs(logFC) > logFC_threshold,
    regulation != "Upabondant_Bulk"
  ) %>%
  group_by(genotype, comparison, regulation) %>%
  summarise(n_ASVs = n(), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(asv_count_geno,
       aes(x = genotype, y = n_ASVs, fill = regulation)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  facet_wrap(~ comparison, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Génotype", y = "Nombre d’ASVs", fill = "")
Code 
ggsave("plot/nombre_ASVs_par_genotype_et_compartiment.png",
       width = 12, height = 8)

res_up <- results_all %>%
  filter(
    FDR < fdr_threshold,
    logFC > logFC_threshold,
    regulation != "Upabondant_Bulk"
  )

compartments <- unique(res_up$comparison)

asv_by_compartment <- list()
for (comp in compartments) {
  
  res_comp <- res_up %>%
    filter(comparison == comp)

  asv_geno <- res_comp %>%
    group_by(ASV) %>%
    summarise(
      n_genotypes = n_distinct(genotype),
      genotypes   = paste(sort(unique(genotype)), collapse = ", "),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(n_genotypes))
  
  asv_by_compartment[[comp]] <- asv_geno
}

n_geno <- n_distinct(results_all$genotype)

write.csv(results_all, 
          "results/edgeR_by_genotype.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE, 
          fileEncoding = "UTF-8")
